title: hann
summary: Generate a Hann window as an N-by-1 real column vector.
description: `hann(N)` returns an `N x 1` real column vector containing the symmetric Hann window coefficients commonly used in signal-processing workflows before spectral analysis.
behaviors: `hann(N)` expects a nonnegative scalar integer length.
For `N > 1`, coefficients follow the standard symmetric Hann formula `0.5 - 0.5*cos(2*pi*n/(N-1))`.
This currently documents the common one-argument symmetric form.
